ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the season */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the league */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the league */,
  "subdivision" TEXT /* Subdivision of the league (if applicable) */,
  "match_name" TEXT /* Name of the match including teams */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the home team */,
  "lose" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the home team */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the home team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "home_team_formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the home team */,
  "away_team_formation" TEXT /* Formation used by the away team */,
  "home_team_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the home team */,
  "away_team_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the manager for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier of the league for this season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the season */,
  "sponsoring_partner" TEXT /* Name of the main sponsor for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "subdivision" TEXT /* Subdivision of the division (if applicable) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles */,
  "current_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the current manager */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the division */,
  "promotion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for promotion to a higher division */,
  "relegation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for relegation to a lower division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subdivisions" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subdivision */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the subdivision */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division this subdivision belongs to */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams in the subdivision */,
  "promotion_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for promotion to the higher division */,
  "relegation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for relegation to a lower division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "match_id" TEXT /* ID of the match linked to this result */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Number of wins recorded */,
  "lose" INTEGER /* Number of losses recorded */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Number of draws recorded */,
  "half_time_score" TEXT /* Score at half-time */,
  "home_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the home team */,
  "away_team_yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards for the away team */,
  "home_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the home team */,
  "away_team_red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards for the away team */,
  "home_team_possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the home team */,
  "away_team_possession_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of possession for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each points entry */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" TEXT /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team in this season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the season */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the season */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference in the season */,
  "match_played" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_points_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to users with this role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
